verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There's not a mountain too tall There's not a problem too small That Jesus can't resolve In time He'll get involved Our God He cares about us

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So wait on the Lord Wait on the Lord Wait on the Lord And He'll renew your strength

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There's not a light too dark A journey too long to embark Jesus will see you through In time He'll make you new Our God He cares about us

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: 'Cause He's ordering, He's ordering your strength You've got to wait, you've got to wait
